title: Add DuOgent to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [DuOgent](https://duogent.onrender.com/) to bots
- Refines AI outputs using DuOgent, a two-agent system with one agent for planning and review and another for execution that iteratively improves results.

Fixes #9055

gist.headline: Two heads are better than one
gist.blurb: A new community bot has entered the garden! DuOgent uses a clever two-agent system—one plans, one executes—to iteratively refine and polish your AI outputs.
gist.summary: Added DuOgent, a two-agent system featuring dedicated planning and execution agents for iterative output refinement, to the community bots showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use DuOgent to generate higher-quality, iteratively improved AI responses through its dual-agent architecture.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces 'DuOgent', a two-agent system (planner + executor). Visual metaphor: Two cute little robots working together. One has a blueprint/clipboard (planner), the other has tools/building blocks (executor). Polly the bee is watching them or helping them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of two tiny chunky robots working together at a wooden workbench, one holding a tiny blueprint and the other holding a glowing pixel wrench. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby, watching them build a glowing code-plant. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of two tiny chunky robots working together at a wooden workbench, one holding a tiny blueprint and the other holding a glowing pixel wrench.
